description: CompositionBlack and red cap made of 100% cotton, has embroidered eyelets on the crown, team logo embroidered on the front crown, nike swoosh embroidered on the side and has an adjustable Velcro fastener at the backWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) FittingComfortWash careHand wash in warm water at 40 degreesDo not wring, bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryA true soccer fan that you are, you must have a favourite football club... and if manchester united is your choice, this black soccer cap from Nike belongs in your collection! Wear this cap as you cheer for the club that has produced biggies like Rooney and Giggs, or when you're scoring on the field yourself! Looks great and offers protection from the sun as well. Team it with your casual clothes to look sporty.
